_doc: Stone Storage — visible storage prop for the stone resource. Same pattern as wood-storage / essence-storage. Placed at (0, 3) on the central axis of the south logistics belt as a 3rd-row complement to the existing wood/essence pair, ahead of the south_wall_zone footprint (x=-4..0, z=5..7). Reserved for the future stone-worker / rock-harvesting feature. Visual ID: cool slate body + silver rim cap (storage-pad preset).
